title: Authors and Citation
text: Torstensson (2026). algaware: Interactive IFCB Phytoplankton Reporting Tool. R package version 0.1.0, https://anderstorstensson.github.io/shiny-ifcb-algaware/.
code: @Manual{,   title = {algaware: Interactive IFCB Phytoplankton Reporting Tool},   author = {Anders Torstensson},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.1.0},   url = {https://anderstorstensson.github.io/shiny-ifcb-algaware/}, }

title: Interactive IFCB Phytoplankton Reporting Tool
text: interactive R/Shiny application processing, validating, reporting phytoplankton data Imaging FlowCytobot (IFCB) instruments. Developed Swedish coastal monitoring SMHI. AlgAware-IFCB integrates IFCB Dashboard automated data retrieval, provides interactive image gallery reviewing correcting AI classifier predictions, generates Word reports biomass maps, heatmaps, image mosaics.

title: Interactive IFCB Phytoplankton Reporting Tool
text: Install GitHub:

title: Interactive IFCB Phytoplankton Reporting Tool
text: application opens default browser.

title: Interactive IFCB Phytoplankton Reporting Tool
text: Fetch metadata IFCB Dashboard instance Filter cruise number date range Automatic spatial matching IFCB bins monitoring stations Baltic Area Download raw data, features, HDF5 classification files FerryBox chlorophyll integration (optional)

title: Interactive IFCB Phytoplankton Reporting Tool
text: Browse classified images taxon region (Baltic Sea / West Coast) Searchable class dropdown quick navigation across 100+ classes Visual tags HAB species non-biological classes Select individual images entire pages Relabel selected images entire classes Invalidate misclassified taxa Store manual annotations SQLite (compatible ClassiPyR) Measurement tool -screen size estimation

title: Interactive IFCB Phytoplankton Reporting Tool
text: Maps: Biomass chlorophyll distribution across stations Heatmaps: Biovolume taxon station visit Stacked bar charts: Relative biovolume composition (top 10 taxa) Summary table: Interactive, sortable station-level data

title: Interactive IFCB Phytoplankton Reporting Tool
text: Automated Word document (.docx) plots station sections Image mosaics top taxa per region (adaptive layout chains vs. compact organisms) HAB species annotations throughout Classifier model attribution Corrections log export (CSV)

title: Interactive IFCB Phytoplankton Reporting Tool
text: Settings persisted ~/.config/R/algaware/settings.json can edited -app Settings panel: Extra monitoring stations can added SHARK station register Settings panel.

title: Interactive IFCB Phytoplankton Reporting Tool
text: Taxa lookup (inst/extdata/taxa_lookup.csv): Phytoplankton taxa WoRMS AphiaID references HAB status flags Station definitions (inst/stations/algaware_stations.tsv): 12 AlgAware monitoring stations (6 Baltic Sea, 6 West Coast) Report template (inst/templates/report_template.docx): Word document template generated reports

title: Interactive IFCB Phytoplankton Reporting Tool
code: algaware/ ├── R/ │   ├── run_app.R              # launch_app() entry point │   ├── mod_settings.R         # Settings module │   ├── mod_data_loader.R      # Data loading pipeline │   ├── mod_gallery.R          # Image gallery browser │   ├── mod_validation.R       # Annotation and relabeling │   ├── mod_report.R           # Report generation module │   ├── data_download.R        # Dashboard API integration │   ├── data_processing.R      # Biovolume and aggregation │   ├── database.R             # SQLite operations │   ├── plots.R                # Maps, heatmaps, bar charts │   ├── mosaics.R              # Adaptive image mosaics │   ├── stations.R             # Station matching │   ├── report.R               # Word document builder │   └── utils.R                # Settings and utilities ├── inst/ │   ├── app/                   # Shiny app (ui.R, server.R) │   ├── extdata/               # Taxa lookup │   ├── stations/              # Station definitions │   └── templates/             # Report template └── tests/testthat/            # Test suite

what: algaware: Interactive IFCB Phytoplankton Reporting Tool — algaware-package
title: algaware: Interactive IFCB Phytoplankton Reporting Tool — algaware-package
text: Shiny application processing, validating, reporting phytoplankton data Imaging FlowCytobot (IFCB) instruments. Integrates IFCB Dashboard data retrieval, supports interactive validation classifier predictions, generates Word reports biomass plots, heatmaps, image mosaics.

title: algaware: Interactive IFCB Phytoplankton Reporting Tool — algaware-package
text: Maintainer: Anders Torstensson anders.torstensson@smhi.se (ORCID)

what: Call the Gemini API (OpenAI-compatible endpoint) — call_gemini
title: Call the Gemini API (OpenAI-compatible endpoint) — call_gemini
text: Uses Google's OpenAI-compatible chat completions endpoint. Includes rate-limit delay stay within free tier (5 RPM Pro, 15 RPM Flash). 429 responses, waits retries 3 times increasing backoff.

title: Call the Gemini API (OpenAI-compatible endpoint) — call_gemini
code: call_gemini(   system_prompt,   user_prompt,   model = llm_model_name("gemini"),   temperature = 0.3 )

title: Call the Gemini API (OpenAI-compatible endpoint) — call_gemini
text: system_prompt System prompt string. user_prompt User prompt string. model Gemini model name (default: "gemini-2.5-pro"). temperature Sampling temperature (default: 0.3).

title: Call the Gemini API (OpenAI-compatible endpoint) — call_gemini
text: Character string generated text.

text: Dispatches call_openai call_gemini. provider NULL, auto-detects available API keys.

title: Call the OpenAI API — call_openai
text: system_prompt System prompt string. user_prompt User prompt string. model OpenAI model name (default: "gpt-4.1"). temperature Sampling temperature (default: 0.3). Lower values produce deterministic, factual output; higher values creative. 0.3 good balance scientific report text.

what: Compute presence categories based on percentage of total counts — compute_presence_categories
title: Compute presence categories based on percentage of total counts — compute_presence_categories
text: Categories follow SHARK/HELCOM abundance scale: 5 = dominant (>=50%), 4 = abundant (>=10%), 3 = common (>=1%), 2 = scarce (>=0.1%), 1 = rare (>0%), 0 = absent.

what: Create an adaptive image mosaic for a taxon — create_mosaic
title: Create an adaptive image mosaic for a taxon — create_mosaic
text: Produces mosaic image elongated organisms (chains) shown single rows fewer images, compact organisms use tighter grid.

title: Create an adaptive image mosaic for a taxon — create_mosaic
code: create_mosaic(   image_paths,   n_images = 32L,   max_width_px = 1800L,   target_height = 120L,   max_height_px = 1500L )

title: Create an adaptive image mosaic for a taxon — create_mosaic
text: image_paths Character vector PNG file paths. n_images Maximum number images include. Default 32. max_width_px Maximum mosaic width pixels. Default 1800 (fits A4 page 300 dpi margins). target_height Base target height pixels. Default 120. max_height_px Maximum mosaic height pixels. Default 1500 (approximately half A4 page 300 dpi). Images dropped stay within limit.

title: Create an adaptive image mosaic for a taxon — create_mosaic
text: magick image object.

code: generate_report(   output_path,   station_summary,   baltic_wide,   westcoast_wide,   baltic_mosaics = list(),   westcoast_mosaics = list(),   taxa_lookup = NULL,   cruise_info = "",   classifier_name = NULL,   use_llm = FALSE,   annotator = "",   image_counts = NULL,   total_bio_images = NULL,   llm_model = NULL,   n_station_samples = NULL,   llm_provider = NULL,   on_llm_progress = NULL )

title: Generate the AlgAware Word report — generate_report
text: output_path Path output .docx file. station_summary Aggregated station data. baltic_wide Wide-format Baltic summary. westcoast_wide Wide-format West Coast summary. baltic_mosaics Named list mosaic images (Baltic). westcoast_mosaics Named list mosaic images (West Coast). taxa_lookup Optional taxa lookup table HAB column. cruise_info Character string cruise/date information title. classifier_name Optional character string classifier model name used automated classification. use_llm Logical; TRUE OPENAI_API_KEY set, generate report text using LLM. Default FALSE uses placeholder text. annotator Character string analyst name introduction statement. image_counts Optional data frame fetch_image_counts() cruise-wide image counts coordinates track map. total_bio_images Optional integer; total number biological images used report (excluding non-biological classes). llm_model Optional character string; name LLM model used text generation (e.g. "gpt-4.1"). n_station_samples Optional integer; total number IFCB samples matched AlgAware stations. llm_provider Optional character string; LLM provider use ("openai" "gemini"). NULL auto-detects. on_llm_progress Optional callback function called LLM request arguments (step, total, detail) progress reporting.

title: Generate the AlgAware Word report — generate_report
text: Invisible path created document.
